figures.caption: Fig. 4: Pretrained vs. from-scratch AUPRC at the 11M scale across four tasks, with labeled patient counts of 100, 500, and 1,000. Three dataset splits shown per condition. The pretrained model (green) generally outperforms the from-scratch model (black). The x-axis is shared across all panels.
TABLE III: Input sequence statistics for four prediction tasks (Median [InterQuartile Range])

Fig. 5: AUPRC of five pretrained Transformers and LGBM across four tasks. Disease prediction benefits from the 32M/101M model; medication prediction saturates at 11M. The task-optimal model consistently outperforms LGBM.
